message:
fix(grpc,ws,http): 6 audit bugs — timeout overflow, pong order, EOF reuse

- grpc/server: prevent Instant+Duration panic on malicious grpc-timeout
  via checked_add; add ASCII guard in parse_grpc_timeout
- grpc/server: rewrite format_grpc_timeout with unit escalation (n/u/m/S/M/H)
  to respect 8-digit gRPC spec limit
- websocket server/client/split: fix pong LIFO→FIFO ordering via reverse()
  before pop() loop (RFC 6455 compliance)
- websocket split: add missing mark_response_sent() after close response
- http/h1 client: reject EOF-delimited bodies from connection reuse per
  RFC 9112 §6.3 (no Content-Length + no Transfer-Encoding = close-framed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
